calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tammie Smith, manager of defendant/appellant COIT Services, Inc.; Katarina Bakerova, plaintiff/respondent appearing in propria persona.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are affirmed.

Tammie Smith testifies on behalf of defendant/appellant COIT Services, Inc. The following additional exhibits are submitted on behalf of defendant/appellant: 2 photos of plaintiff's couch.

Katarina Bakerova, plaintiff/respondent testifies on her own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Anne Wong, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-02-2019 Judgment Entered
